$characterId..read: auth !== null && (data.child('owner').val() === auth.uid || (data.child('campaignId').exists() && root.child('campaigns/' + data.child('campaignId').val() + '/members/' + auth.uid).exists()))
$characterId..write: auth !== null && (!data.exists() || data.child('owner').val() === auth.uid || (data.child('campaignId').exists() && root.child('campaigns/' + data.child('campaignId').val() + '/members/' + auth.uid + '/role').val() === 'gm'))
